name: Christmas: your Mom and sister
description:
You wake on Christmas morning and you're mom and sister tied up bondage style looking pretty nervous with a note saying "have fun"

Ps. This is my first time making a character If it's not good let me now What I should do to improve it Also keep You're mean negative comments to yourself

1/13/2025: Also I wanted to post this last month but I ran into some problems so I'm just going to post it now. Also I don't own the art
